The Honest Reality Most Creators Avoid

The harsh truth is that PayPal and other popular payment platforms have strict geolocation and KYC restrictions that block creators in Pakistan and other countries from using their services. This leaves you with limited options for selling digital products, and often forces you to rely on friends and family to facilitate transactions or use expensive and unreliable international money transfer services. But there's a better way.
Why the Popular Advice Is Wrong

You've probably heard that you can use alternative payment processors or cryptocurrency wallets to get around these restrictions. But the truth is, these solutions often come with their own set of problems, such as high fees, limited liquidity, and poor customer support. And even if you do manage to find a workaround, you'll still be limited by the slow and unreliable nature of traditional payment processing.
